title: Chuck Norris
about:
Chuck Norris , born Carlos Ray "Chuck" Norris on March 10th, 1940, is a martial artist, actor and cultural star. Chuck Norris is mostly known for his roles in the TV series Walker, Texas Ranger , as well as The Way of the Dragon , where he played alongside Bruce Lee . Chuck Norris has come to represent the epitome of manliness and awesomeness in culture, mostly due to his roles as a fighter in movies and TV shows. The meme Chuck Norris Facts plays off this, as all the "facts" deal with Norris' ability to do anything because of his manliness. He can also be seen in many pictures holding two automatic machine guns and/or having an exposed chest.

On March 19th, 2026, it was reported that Chuck Norris had been hospitalized after a medical emergency on the island of Kauai in Hawaii, where he owned a home. The following day, on March 20th, the Norris family then announced via an Instagram post that he had suddenly passed away. The death of Norris quickly led to an outpouring of tributes and reactions online, with many across social media sharing Chuck Norris memes and jokes in remembrance of the actor as the news spread.
